song.title: He Has Made Me Glad
song.lyrics:
[V1] . D G I will enter His gates . D With thanksgiving in my heart. . G A I will enter His courts with praise. . D G I will say this is the day . D Bm That the Lord has made. . G I will rejoice for .A D He has made me glad.
[C] .D G He has made me glad. .D Bm He has made me glad. . G I will rejoice for .A D A He has made me glad .D G He has made me glad. .D Bm He has made me glad. . G I will rejoice for .A D He has made me glad
